title: Policy Process
shortSummary: Trace how public problems become options, how options become decisions, and how decisions become programs, regulation, funding, or legislation.
whyItMatters: Policy is where politics becomes substance. This module helps you see how problems are framed, who gets consulted, where options are filtered out, and why implementation matters as much as the decision itself.
mentalModels: The policy cycle is messy but still useful as a memory tool
Much of the real contest happens before a bill is public
Implementation is where elegant policy ideas collide with reality

goDeeper.label: See the policy brief project
goDeeper.description: Turn the policy cycle into an actual decision-ready document.

goDeeper.label: Continue into legislation and regulation
goDeeper.description: See when policy needs a law, and how the law gets made.
